headline: Kalshi Finagled a World Cup Sponsorship Deal at a Deep Discount
summary: (Bloomberg) -- When the World Cup knockout round began Sunday, Kalshi joined the likes of Coca-Cola, Visa and Adidas with sideline advertising in the stadiums — an unusual addition, given that the event is halfway over, and also that FIFA already signed up an “official prediction markets partner” in ADI Predictstreet, a startup with ties to the Abu Dhabi royal family. headline: This Dividend Strategy Generates $85,000 a Year for Retirees
summary: About $85,000 a year is what a comfortable middle-class retirement costs in most U.S. metros after Social Security benefits fill part of the gap. It is also close to the median household income in the country. For investors who think in terms of replacing a paycheck through dividends, the question is simple: How much capital ... headline: These 5 Passive Income Stocks Could Pay You For Life
summary: Earned income demands your time. Passive income asks only that you stay invested. Dividend stocks remain the cornerstone of retirement portfolios because a check that arrives whether you worked Monday or not feels fundamentally different from a paycheck. Real estate offers similar cash flow but locks capital behind tenants, repairs, and illiquid mortgages. Dividend stocks ... These 5 Passive Income Stocks Could Pay You For Life

headline: Coca-Cola Consolidated Helps Tackle Food Insecurity: Provides 250,000 Meals Across 14 States and Washington, D.C.
summary: As the nation’s largest Coca-Cola bottler serving 14 states and Washington, D.C., the company focused on its continuing commitment to serve others through consistent action and meaningful community partnerships. Together with nonprofits, local partners, America250, and The Coca-Cola Company, Coca-Cola Consolidated teammates not only met but exceeded their goal, packing nearly 300,000 meals to support families in need since the start of this calendar year. headline: Coca-Cola® Announces All-Star Lineup and Cultural Experiences for the 2026 Essence Festival of Culture®
summary: NEW ORLEANS, June 30, 2026--Coca-Cola® today announced its entertainment lineup and cultural programming for the 2026 ESSENCE Festival of Culture®, taking place July 3-5, 2026, in New Orleans. Celebrating its 31st consecutive year as a festival partner, Coca-Cola will feature performances from rising R&B star, Destin Conrad, chart-topping performer, Coi Leray, and Grammy-nominated R&B artist, Mario, alongside community activations, HBCU programming and immersive experiences from Coca-Cola®, Simp

headline: The Celebration Portfolio That Pays For Date Nights, Birthdays, And Anniversaries Forever
summary: Retirement planning usually starts with fear: housing, healthcare, and outliving the portfolio. Yet many of the moments people remember most have little to do with those necessities. Anniversary dinners. Birthday gifts for children and grandchildren. A weekend getaway. Tickets to a concert or ballgame. headline: Coca-Cola to close Massachusetts bottling plant
summary: The beverage giant will lay off 175 workers as part of the closure, which impacts noncarbonated beverage production and has been planned for several years.
